page_text: Official DAAD scholarship page for the 2026/27 academic year. International students from Sri Lanka may apply for Master's study in AI-related programmes in Germany. Funding includes full tuition support and monthly living allowance. Deadline is 15 October 2026.

rules.requirement_text: Scholarship applies to the 2026/27 academic year.
rules.evidence_text: Official DAAD page states 2026/27 academic year.
Official DAAD page lists Sri Lanka among eligible countries.

rules.requirement_text: Applicants may reside in their home country at application time.
rules.evidence_text: Official DAAD page says applicants normally apply from their country of residence.
Official DAAD page describes the scholarship for international students.
Official DAAD page says Master's study in Germany.

rules.requirement_text: Artificial Intelligence and data science are eligible fields.
rules.evidence_text: Official DAAD page includes AI-related programmes.

rules.requirement_text: Award covers at least 40 percent funding need.
rules.evidence_text: Official DAAD page lists full tuition support and monthly living allowance.
Official DAAD page lists deadline 15 October 2026.
Official DAAD page instructs applicants to submit through the DAAD portal with academic documents.
